creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yonas Yanfa from comment #3)
Then, I'm sure you will concur with me that this PR is a bit strange.

First, because you didn't even provide that link to the information as to why catsit is deprecated. Second because the port you want to replace it with does not exists in the tree. And third because despite that last thing, you provided a patch to remove the pledge() call (that I didn't know where to apply...).

It was confusing to say the least :-)

I'll close this PR because we can't mark a port as deprecated in order to replace it with something we don't have yet.

Patches welcome.
